name: daily_recap
description: Quartermaster posts the end-of-day recap — what cleared, what's pending review, what's still in flight. Runs Mon–Thu at 5pm.

message.value: Run job: daily_recap. Query tasks with status='cleared' or 'placed', placements with state='under_review', and remaining 'assigned' tasks. Compose the end-of-day digest: what the team cleared, what's pending a manager's approval, what's still in flight. Log to agent_actions (kind=recap). Return the digest.
